title: Surgeon Vacancy at Aurobindo Pharma - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Aurobindo Pharma - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Aurobindo Pharma has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aurobindo Pharma:
Aurobindo Pharma is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aurobindo Pharma!
